# Default purchase incoterm per partner

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds incoterms for suppliers and purchase order:

- incoterm modes
- incoterm address
